title: POST /api/agent/search-context — thin Kioku wrapper + unit test
implementation_notes: IMPORTANT: This is a thin wrapper — do NOT re-implement search logic. Call the existing Kioku service directly.
Pattern: read app/server/api/kioku/search.post.ts carefully. It calls searchKiokuCanonicalState(query, { readModel, storage }).
Import and call the same searchKiokuCanonicalState function from app/server/services/kioku/retriever.ts.
Request body: { query: string } — same as /api/kioku/search.
Response shape (agent-friendly, no raw vault objects):
tasks: Array<{ id, title, status, priority, assignee, boardId, projectId, updatedAt }>,
Map from KiokuSearchResponse to this shape — do not leak KiokuHit internal fields.
Return 422 if query is empty string.
- mock searchKiokuCanonicalState to return fixture KiokuSearchResponse
- assert output shape is correct (no raw vault fields)
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/agent/search-context returns { query, tasks[], projects[], boards[] }.
Response contains no raw vault body text or execution_notes.
Unit test covers happy path + empty query + empty results.
bun test passes with no new failures.
completion_summary: Added POST /api/agent/search-context as a thin sanitized wrapper over Kioku search with focused tests.
